question: What is the total completed-order revenue per product category, highest first?

attempts.raw_response: {"sql": "SELECT p.category, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM order_items AS oi JOIN orders AS o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products AS p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY revenue DESC, p.category", "assumptions": ["gold replay"], "selected_tables": []}

candidate.sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM order_items AS oi JOIN orders AS o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products AS p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY revenue DESC, p.category

policy.normalized_sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM order_items AS oi JOIN orders AS o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products AS p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY revenue DESC, p.category LIMIT 200
